scripts.generate: rm -rf ../shared/src/timeback/generated && mkdir -p ../shared/src/timeback/generated && bun x openapi-zod-client ./specs/CoreAPI.yaml -o ../shared/src/timeback/generated/core.ts --template ./templates/zodios-with-endpoints.hbs --group-strategy tag-file --strict-objects --with-docs --export-schemas --export-types && bun x openapi-zod-client ./specs/CaliperAPI.yaml -o ../shared/src/timeback/generated/caliper.ts --template ./templates/zodios-with-endpoints.hbs --group-strategy tag-file --strict-objects --with-docs --export-schemas --export-types
